title: strophanthus singaporianus
intro: Strophanthus singaporianus, also known as the Singaporean Strophanthus or Singaporean Bushman's Friend, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family, native to Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Strophanthus singaporianus are attributed to its cardiac glycosides, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various cardiovascular conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to lower blood pressure, treat heart failure, and improve cardiovascular function. In herbal preparations, Strophanthus singaporianus is often dried and used in teas, tinctures, or capsules, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to potential side effects and interactions.
